hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=(i.tool_input&&i.tool_input.file_path)||'';if(p.includes('APIKeys.swift')&&!p.includes('template')){process.stderr.write('BLOCKED: APIKeys.swift is gitignored. Edit APIKeys.template.swift instead.\n');process.exit(2);}});"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=(i.tool_input&&i.tool_input.file_path)||'';if(p.includes('.xcodeproj')){process.stderr.write('BLOCKED: .xcodeproj is generated by XcodeGen. Edit project.yml and run xcodegen generate instead.\n');process.exit(2);}});"
